      <title>Draymond Green, Devin Booker ejected in final minute of Suns' blowout win</title>
      <description>Draymond Green made sure to go out with a bang on Friday as the Golden State Warriors’ season came to an end at the hands of Devin Booker and the Phoenix Suns.</description>

    <item>
      <title>All-Star duo leads Nuggets to ugly Game 1 win over Timberwolves</title>
      <description>The Denver Nuggets couldn't make threes, lost Aaron Gordon to foul trouble and fell behind by double digits early. Thanks to patience, defense and their All-Star duo, Denver took Game One over the Minnesota Timberwolves anyway.</description>
      <pubDate>18 Apr 2026 19:16:31 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/all_star_duo_leads_nuggets_to_ugly_game_1_win_over_timberwolves/s1_13132_43744454</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/all_star_duo_leads_nuggets_to_ugly_game_1_win_over_timberwolves/s1_13132_43744454</guid>
      <author>Sean Keane, Yardbarker</author>
      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/6/a/6a3b9fb18e21f0f89d641f5aa18111c4bdf2fd0b/thumb_16x9/star-duo-leads-nuggets-ugly-game-1-win-over.jpg">
        <media:credit> Christopher Hanewinckel-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Denver Nuggets center Nikola Jokic (15) is fouled by Minnesota Timberwolves guard Anthony Edwards (5) as he handles the ball during the first half in game one of the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Ball Arena.  </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Denver Nuggets</category>
      <category>Minnesota Timberwolves</category>
      <category>Nikola Jokic</category>
      <category>Aaron Gordon</category>
      <category>Jamal Murray</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Nikola Jokic, Jamal Murray show why Nuggets are still NBA title contenders</title>
      <description>Do not forget about the Denver Nuggets, because they are still here, they are still relevant, and they still have a championship duo that is perfectly capable of putting the team on their backs and carrying it to greatness.</description>
      <pubDate>18 Apr 2026 19:59:27 -0400</pubDate>

    <item>
      <title>Unlikely hero Luke Kennard leads Lakers to Game 1 win over Rockets</title>

    <item>
      <title>Paolo Banchero earns redemption in Magic's win over Hornets</title>
      <description>In earning some redemption and continuing to make a name for himself, Paolo Banchero put on a show on Friday night.   Banchero's performance led the Orlando Magic to a 121-90 win over the Charlotte Hornets, securing an actual spot in the NBA playoffs. </description>
      <pubDate>17 Apr 2026 22:35:48 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/paolo_banchero_earns_redemption_in_magics_win_over_hornets/s1_13132_43741913</link>

        <media:credit> Mike Watters-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Charlotte Hornets guard Sion James (4) defends Orlando Magic forward Paolo Banchero (5) during the second half of the play-in rounds of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Kia Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Orlando Magic</category>
      <category>Charlotte Hornets</category>
      <category>Detroit Pistons</category>
      <category>Philadelphia 76ers</category>
      <category>Desmond Bane</category>

    </item>
